name: budget / Car rental workflow 7
goal_pattern: Get an SUV with an additional driver and wifi for pick up in  any rental location near Washington regional airport on June 1, 11 am, and drop off at Washington international airport on June 2, 11 am, and pay for the booking instantly.

termination.success_check: Stop when the task-specific goal is satisfied or the expected confirmation/result is visible.

guards: Never copy old element ids; choose only ids visible in the current observation.
